meta.title: Toolpix — Free Online Micro Tools
meta.description: Calculators, developer tools, text tools and more. Completely free, browser-based micro tools.

hero.title: The tool you need, just a click away.
hero.subtitle: Calculators, developer tools, text converters and more. No registration required, completely free.

calculators.title: Calculators
calculators.desc: Percentage, VAT, crypto average, freelancer rate, tip and salary calculators.

devtools.title: Developer Tools
devtools.desc: Password generator, QR code, WhatsApp link, color converter, Base64, JSON formatter.

texttools.title: Text Tools
texttools.desc: Fancy text, case converter, whitespace remover, reverse text, SEO meta, character counter.

time.title: Time Tools
time.desc: Date difference, age calculator, timezone converter, pomodoro timer.

fancyText.title: Fancy Text Generator
fancyText.desc: Convert your text into cool Unicode characters for Instagram, TikTok or games.

caseConverter.title: Case Converter
caseConverter.desc: Convert your text to uppercase, lowercase, title case and sentence case with one click.

whitespaceRemover.title: Whitespace Remover
whitespaceRemover.desc: Clean up extra spaces and line breaks from text copied from PDFs or websites.

reverseText.title: Reverse Text Generator
reverseText.desc: Write your text backwards. Perfect for fun and viral content.

seoMeta.title: SEO Meta Tag Generator
seoMeta.desc: Automatically generate title and description meta tags for your website.

charCounter.title: Word & Character Counter
charCounter.desc: Instantly see words, characters, sentences and paragraphs of your text.

percentage.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage.desc: Quick percentage calculations, increase/decrease rates and proportional math.

vat.title: VAT Calculator
vat.desc: Add VAT to an amount or extract VAT from a gross amount.

cryptoAvg.title: Crypto Average Cost Calculator
cryptoAvg.desc: Calculate your average cost with current and new purchase prices.

freelancerRate.title: Freelancer Hourly Rate Calculator
freelancerRate.desc: Find out what hourly rate you should charge based on your expenses.

tipCalc.title: Tip Calculator
tipCalc.desc: Split the bill by number of people and tip percentage.

salary.title: Salary Calculator
salary.desc: Gross-to-net salary calculator. See tax and deductions instantly.

dateDiff.title: Date Difference Calculator
dateDiff.desc: Calculate the number of days, months and years between two dates.

ageCalc.title: Age Calculator
ageCalc.desc: Enter your birth date and see how many years, months, days and hours you've been alive.

timezone.title: Timezone Converter
timezone.desc: Convert time from one timezone to another.

pomodoro.title: Online Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.desc: Focus for 25 minutes, take a 5-minute break. Productive work technique.

passwordGen.title: Password Generator
passwordGen.desc: Generate strong, hard-to-crack passwords with custom length and character options.

qrCode.title: QR Code Generator
qrCode.desc: Convert a link or text into a QR code and download as PNG.

whatsappLink.title: WhatsApp Link Generator
whatsappLink.desc: Create a direct message link without saving the number.

colorConverter.title: Color Code Converter
colorConverter.desc: Convert between HEX, RGB and HSL color formats instantly.

base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.desc: Convert text to Base64 format or decode Base64 back to text.

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.desc: Convert complex JSON data into readable format.

common.footer: Free online tools. No registration required.
